title: Raksha Mantri congratulates General Phan Van Giang on his appointment as Deputy PM & Defence Minister of Vietnam
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Defence

Raksha Mantri congratulates General Phan Van Giang on his appointment as Deputy PM & Defence Minister of Vietnam

India looks forward to further strengthening longstanding defence ties with Vietnam: Shri Rajnath Singh

Posted On:
09 APR 2026 9:42AM by PIB Delhi

Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh has congratulated General Phan Van Giang on his appointment as the Deputy Prime Minister and the Minister of National Defence of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam. In a post on X, Raksha Mantri stated that India looks forward to further strengthening its longstanding defence ties with Vietnam and deepening cooperation across security, military exchanges & industry collaboration. He exuded confidence that India-Vietnam partnership will continue to grow from strength to strength in the years ahead.



Warm congratulations to General Phan Van Giang on his appointment as the Deputy Prime Minister and the Minister of National Defence of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam.
India looks forward to further strengthening our longstanding defence ties and deepening cooperation across…
pic.twitter.com/1nQ0EL2qep
— Rajnath Singh (@rajnathsingh)
April 9, 2026
